card1.title: Promote your brand through fleet exposure
card1.description: Increase brand awareness with high-impact vehicle advertising. Wasel's fleet operates across strategic routes, giving your business maximum exposure and continuous audience engagement.

card2.title: Transparent pricing and trip updates
card2.description: Clear pricing. No surprises. Real-time updates every step of the way.

card3.title: Request heavy transportation in minutes
card3.description: No more long calls or manual coordination. With Wasel, you can request heavy transport in just a few taps and receive instant confirmation with real-time tracking.

section3.heading: Maximizing Value for Every Partner
section3.subtitle: Wasel delivers efficiency, transparency, and growth opportunities for every partner in the network.

card1.title: Manage multiple drivers in one dashboard
card1.description: Control and monitor your entire fleet from one powerful dashboard. Track trips, assign requests, and oversee driver performance with real-time updates and complete transparency.

card2.title: Instant trip notifications
card2.description: Get notified instantly when a new trip is available near you.

card3.title: Manage multiple drivers in one dashboard
card3.description: Control and monitor your entire fleet from one powerful dashboard. Track trips, assign requests, and oversee driver performance with real-time updates and complete transparency.

section1.para1: Specialized in heavy and large-weight transportation.
section1.para2: We connect users, drivers, fleet owners, and advertisers through smart digital solutions designed to improve efficiency,
section1.para3: transparency, and operational control. Our mission is to modernize heavy transport by delivering reliable, scalable, and innovative tools that power growth across the entire ecosystem.

card1.title: Reliability
card1.description: We understand that heavy transportation demands precision and dependability. That's why we build systems that ensure secure operations, verified partners.

card2.title: Transparency
card2.description: Clear pricing, real-time tracking, and open communication are at the core of our platform. We believe trust is built through visibility and honest operations.

card3.title: Partnership
card3.description: Wasel is more than a platform — it's a network. We value strong relationships with drivers, companies, users, and advertisers, growing together through collaboration.

card0.description: Wasel is not just a transportation app — it is a complete logistics ecosystem designed to create measurable value for everyone involved.

card1.description: To simplify heavy transportation by delivering smart, reliable, and scalable digital solutions that empower every partner in the logistics chain.

card2.description: We are committed to building a trusted transportation network where reliability, transparency, and performance drive long-term success.

card3.description: To become the leading heavy transportation platform in the region, setting new standards for operational efficiency, transparency, and technological innovation.

allContent.title: Explore All Our Articles
allContent.description: Browse every insight, trend, and expert story from the Wasel team — covering logistics, smart transportation, supply chain innovation, and more.

1.title: How AI Is Reshaping Software Development in 2026
1.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing how developers write, test, and deploy code. From AI copilots to automated testing pipelines, discover how development teams are becoming faster and more efficient.

2.title: Building Scalable SaaS Platforms: Lessons from Modern Startups
2.description: Startups today must design systems that scale from hundreds to millions of users. This article explores architecture patterns, microservices, and cloud-native strategies used by fast-growing SaaS companies.

3.title: The Rise of AI Voice Agents in Customer Support
3.description: Voice AI is becoming a powerful tool for businesses. Learn how AI voice agents are reducing support costs, improving response times, and creating more natural customer experiences.

how-heavy-transportation-is-construction.description: From flatbeds to specialized vehicles, learn how on-demand heavy truck booking is changing the construction industry.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: Have questions about Wasel? We've got you covered. Here you'll find answers to the most common inquiries

0.q: Do you do web design or web development?
0.a: We offer both web design and web development services to suit your project needs.

1.q: I'm an agency, do you develop Figma designs?
1.a: Yes, we develop pixel-perfect implementations from Figma designs.

2.q: Why do I develop solely using Webflow?
2.a: Webflow provides a powerful visual development environment with flexible design control.

3.a: Pricing depends on project scope, timeline, and complexity. Contact us for a custom quote.

4.q: Is there any extra cost involved?
4.a: We provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Any additional work is discussed beforehand.

5.a: Project timelines vary based on scope. We'll provide a clear delivery estimate after reviewing your requirements.

6.q: Do I need a developer to make future updates on my website?
6.a: Not necessarily. We can set up a CMS or provide training so you can manage updates yourself.
